instructions.summary: Set up Google Search Console for verdedesk.vercel.app — this is the #1 blocker for all organic traffic. Zero pages indexed after 24 sessions.
instructions.detail: Google has indexed zero pages from verdedesk.vercel.app despite 17 prerendered pages, valid sitemap, IndexNow pings, and 8 backlink PRs. Without GSC, we cannot submit URLs for indexing, submit the sitemap, or diagnose crawl issues. This has been the top blocker since session 12.
instructions.exact_action:
Takes 5 minutes:

1. Go to https://search.google.com/search-console
2. Click 'Add property'
3. Choose 'URL prefix' and enter: https://verdedesk.vercel.app
4. Choose 'HTML tag' verification method
5. Copy the meta tag (looks like: <meta name="google-site-verification" content="abc123..." />)
6. Run this in Terminal:
   cd ~/Developer/founder-os-seed
   # The agent will add the meta tag to the site automatically once you share it
   # For now, just paste the content value in a reply iMessage or email
7. After I add the tag and deploy, come back to GSC and click 'Verify'
8. Then go to Sitemaps (left menu) and submit: https://verdedesk.vercel.app/sitemap.xml

Alternative (faster): Use the 'HTML file' method — GSC will give you a file like google1234abc.html. Share the filename and I'll add it to the site.
instructions.unblocks: Google indexing of all 17 pages — the only path to organic search traffic and waitlist signups
